Included works are: Hexaptychon I for mixed choir a capella, op. 36 (1996-97) [IMI 7175/I, 10 p.]; Hexaptychon II for contralto, oboe, and continuo, op. 37 (1996-97) [IMI 7175/II, 11 p.]; Hexaptychon III for string quartet, op. 38 (1996-97) [IMI 7175/III, 11 p.]; Hexaptychon IV for harp and string quartet, op. 39 (1996-97) [IMI 7175/IV, 14 p.]; Hexaptychon V for harp, op. 40 (1996-97) [IMI 7175/V, 8 p.]; Hexaptychon VI for piano 4 hands, op. 41 (1996-97) [IMI 7175/VI, 14 p.].

7x7 bars for orchestra instruments and players.
1 orchestral score + 4 sectional scores + 2 parts + 1 instruction page
61 cm (orchestral score), 42 cm (woodwind, brass, piano, and string sectional scores), 33 cm (trombone part and instruction page), 30 cm (flute part)

1 orchestral score ("7x7 bars for orchestra instruments and players") + 1 woodwind section score ("7x7 bars for w.w and w.w players) + 1 brass section score ("7x7 bars for brass and brass players") + 1 percussion section score ("7x7 bars for perc. and perc. player") + 1 piano section score ("7x7 bars for piano and pianist") + 1 string section score ("7x7 bars for strings and string players") + 1 trombone part ("7x7 bars for trombone and trb player") + 1 flute part ("flauto part") + 1 instruction page ("Instruction page for 7x7")Trombone part is 2 pages. All other parts are 1 oversized page of varying dimensions.
All instruction page, orchestral score, sectional score, and parts are all single pages of varying dimensions.
